project_privacy_data_flows.description: Each article view creates a HistoryEntry persisted to local Room database. History tracks page titles, language, namespace, visit timestamps, and navigation source.

flow_steps.code: constructor(title: PageTitle, source: Int, timestamp: Date = Date()) : this(title.wikiSite.authority(), title.wikiSite.languageCode, title.text, title.displayText, namespace = title.namespace, timestamp = timestamp, source = source)
flow_steps.details: Each page view creates HistoryEntry with page authority, language, title, namespace, timestamp, and source (search, link, feed, etc.).
History entry persisted to Room database with indices on (lang, namespace, apiTitle) for efficient querying.
History displayed in ActivityTab reading history module. Supports filtering and deletion of history items.
User can clear browsing history, which deletes entries from Room database.
